description: Minimal runnable reference of a headless cmssy site on Next.js (App Router) with the cmssy SDK - the shape `npx @cmssy/cli init` generates.
rules: Edit mode requires a VERIFIED request: cmssyEdit=1 AND a cmssySecret matching the workspace draft secret. Use the createCmssyProxy preset from @cmssy/next/middleware - never treat a bare cmssyEdit=1 as edit mode.
The editor origin is https://www.cmssy.io (cmssy cloud). app.cmssy.com does not exist.
Each block exports its field schema as `props` and the component is typed BlockProps<typeof props> - never hand-write block content types.
Locales come from the workspace (Settings -> Languages); CmssyConfig has no defaultLocale/enabledLocales.
To wire cmssy into an existing app, run: npx @cmssy/cli init && npx @cmssy/cli link.
